info.title: Dynamic API Specification
info.description: This is a dynamically generated API specification for all endpoints existing on the current project.

get.description: Image typed files can be dynamically resized and transformed to fit any need.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the asset size configured in settings.

parameters.name: transforms
parameters.description: A JSON array of image transformations

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Download the asset to your computer

email.description: Email address of the user you're retrieving the access token for.

mode.description: Whether to retrieve the refresh token in the JSON response, or in a httpOnly cookie.

otp.description: The user's one-time-password (if MFA is enabled).

refresh_token.description: JWT access token you want to refresh. This token can't be expired.

mode.description: Whether to submit and retrieve the refresh token in the JSON response, or in a httpOnly cookie.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token to invalidate. If you have the refresh token in a cookie through /auth/login, you don't have to submit it here.

mode.description: Whether the refresh token is submitted in the JSON response, or in a httpOnly cookie.

post.description: Request that a password reset email be sent. This does not apply to users authenticated through external providers (OAuth, SAML, LDAP, etc.).

email.description: Email address of the user you're requesting a reset for.

post.description: The request a password reset endpoint sends an email with a link to the admin app which in turn uses this endpoint to allow the user to reset their password.

token.description: One-time use JWT token that is used to verify the user.

get.description: List configured OAuth providers.
Start OAuth flow using the specified provider

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Key of the activated OAuth provider.

parameters.name: redirect
parameters.description:
Where to redirect on successful login.
If set the authentication details are set inside cookies otherwise a JSON is returned.

get.description: Retrieve the current schema. This endpoint is only available to admin users.

post.description: Update the instance's schema by passing the diff previously retrieved via `/schema/diff` endpoint in the JSON request body or a JSON/YAML file. This endpoint is only available to admin users.
Compare the current instance's schema against the schema snapshot in JSON request body or a JSON/YAML file and retrieve the difference. This endpoint is only available to admin users.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Bypass version and database vendor restrictions.

get.description: Perform a system status check and return the options.

parameters.description: The first time you create a project, the provided token will be saved and required for subsequent project installs. It can also be found and configured in `/config/__api.json` on your server.
parameters.name: super_admin_token

get.description: Ping, pong. Ping.. pong.

post.description: Generate a hash for a given string.
Generate a hash for a given string.

hash.description: Hash you want to verify against.

post.description: Re-sort items in collection based on start and to value of item

item.description: Primary key of item to move

to.description: Primary key of item where to move the current item to

post.description: Import multiple records from a JSON or CSV file into a collection.
Export a larger data set to a file in the File Library

format.description: What file format to save the export to. One of csv, csv_utf8, xml, json, yaml

post.description: Resets both the data and schema cache of Directus.

get.description: Returns a random string of given length.
Returns a list of activity actions.
Retrieves the details of an existing activity action. Provide the primary key of the activity action and Directus will return the corresponding information.
List all permissions.

collection.description: What collection this permission applies to.

comment.description: If the user can post comments.

create.description: If the user can create items.

delete.description: If the user can update items.

explain.description: If the user is required to leave a comment explaining what was changed.

read.description: If the user can read items.

role.description: Unique identifier of the role this permission applies to.

read_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies read access for specific fields.

status.description: What status this permission applies to.

status_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies specific statuses to be used.

update.description: If the user can update items.

write_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies write access for specific fields.

patch.description: Update multiple permissions at the same time.

collection.description: What collection this permission applies to.

comment.description: If the user can post comments.

create.description: If the user can create items.

delete.description: If the user can update items.

explain.description: If the user is required to leave a comment explaining what was changed.

read.description: If the user can read items.

role.description: Unique identifier of the role this permission applies to.

read_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies read access for specific fields.

status.description: What status this permission applies to.

status_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies specific statuses to be used.

update.description: If the user can update items.

write_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies write access for specific fields.

get.description: List the permissions that apply to the current user.
Retrieve a single permissions object by unique identifier.

collection.description: What collection this permission applies to.

comment.description: If the user can post comments. `full`.

create.description: If the user can create items.

delete.description: If the user can update items.

explain.description: If the user is required to leave a comment explaining what was changed.

read.description: If the user can read items.

read_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies read access for specific fields.

role.description: Unique identifier of the role this permission applies to.

status.description: What status this permission applies to.

status_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies specific statuses to be used.

update.description: If the user can update items.

write_field_blacklist.description: Explicitly denies write access for specific fields.

get.description: Returns a list of the collections available in the project.

post.description: Create a new collection in Directus.

collection.description: Unique name of the collection.

fields.description: The fields contained in this collection. See the fields reference for more information. Each individual field requires field, type, and interface to be provided.

icon.description: Name of a Google Material Design Icon that's assigned to this collection.

display_template.description: Text representation of how items from this collection are shown across the system.

hidden.description: Whether or not the collection is hidden from the navigation in the admin app.

singleton.description: Whether or not the collection is treated as a single object.

translation.description: Key value pairs of how to show this collection's name in different languages in the admin app.

versioning.description: Whether or not Content Versioning is enabled for this collection.

archive_field.description: What field holds the archive value.

archive_app_filter.description: What value to use for "archived" items.

archive_value.description: What value to use to "unarchive" items.

unarchive_value.description: Whether or not to show the "archived" filter.

sort_field.description: The sort field in the collection.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a single collection.

icon.description: Name of a Google Material Design Icon that's assigned to this collection.

color.description: Choose the color for the icon assigned to this collection.

display_template.description: Text representation of how items from this collection are shown across the system.

hidden.description: Whether or not the collection is hidden from the navigation in the admin app.

singleton.description: Whether or not the collection is treated as a single object.

translation.description: Key value pairs of how to show this collection's name in different languages in the admin app.

versioning.description: Whether or not Content Versioning is enabled for this collection.

archive_field.description: What field holds the archive value.

archive_app_filter.description: What value to use for "archived" items.

archive_value.description: What value to use to "unarchive" items.

unarchive_value.description: Whether or not to show the "archived" filter.

sort_field.description: The sort field in the collection.

delete.description: Delete an existing collection. Warning: This will delete the whole collection, including the items within. Proceed with caution.

get.description: List the folders.

parent.description: Unique identifier of the parent folder. This allows for nested folders.

patch.description: Update multiple folders at the same time.

parent.description: Unique identifier of the parent folder. This allows for nested folders.

get.description: Retrieve a single folder by unique identifier.

name.description: Name of the folder. Can't be null or empty.

parent.description: Unique identifier of the parent folder. This allows for nested folders.

get.description: List the files.

patch.description: Update multiple files at the same time.

get.description: Retrieve a single file by unique identifier.

patch.description: Update an existing file, and/or replace it's file contents.

title.description: Title for the file. Is extracted from the filename on upload, but can be edited by the user.

filename_download.description: Preferred filename when file is downloaded.

folder.description: Virtual folder where this file resides in.

tags.description: Tags for the file. Is automatically populated based on Exif data for images.

title.description: Title for the file. Is extracted from the filename on upload, but can be edited by the user.

filename_download.description: Preferred filename when file is downloaded.

folder.description: Virtual folder where this file resides in.

tags.description: Tags for the file. Is automatically populated based on Exif data for images.

get.description: List the users.

patch.description: Update multiple users at the same time.

get.description: Retrieve a single user by unique identifier.

post.description: Invites one or more users to this project. It creates a user with an invited status, and then sends an email to the user with instructions on how to activate their account.

email.description: Email address or array of email addresses of the to-be-invited user(s).

post.description: Accepts and enables an invited user using a JWT invitation token.

get.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the last used page field of the currently authenticated user. This is used internally to be able to open the Directus admin app from the last page you used.

last_page.description: Path of the page you used last.

post.description: Enables two-factor authentication for the currently authenticated user.
Disables two-factor authentication for the currently authenticated user.

get.description: List the roles.

enforce_tfa.description: Whether or not this role enforces the use of 2FA.

external_id.description: ID used with external services in SCIM.

ip_access.description: Array of IP addresses that are allowed to connect to the API as a user of this role.

module_listing.description: Custom override for the admin app module bar navigation.

List the presets.

collection.description: What collection this collection preset is used for.

title.description: Name for the bookmark. If this is set, the collection preset will be considered to be a bookmark.

role.description: The unique identifier of a role in the platform. If user is null, this will be used to apply the collection preset or bookmark for all users in the role.

search.description: What the user searched for in search/filter in the header bar.

layout.description: Name of the view type that is used.

layout_query.description: Layout query that's saved per layout type. Controls what data is fetched on load. These follow the same format as the JS SDK parameters.

layout_options.description: Options of the views. The properties in here are controlled by the layout.

patch.description: Update multiple presets at the same time.

collection.description: What collection this collection preset is used for.

title.description: Name for the bookmark. If this is set, the collection preset will be considered to be a bookmark.

role.description: The unique identifier of a role in the platform. If user is null, this will be used to apply the collection preset or bookmark for all users in the role.

search.description: What the user searched for in search/filter in the header bar.

layout.description: Name of the view type that is used.

layout_query.description: Layout query that's saved per layout type. Controls what data is fetched on load. These follow the same format as the JS SDK parameters.

layout_options.description: Options of the views. The properties in here are controlled by the layout.

get.description: Retrieve a single preset by unique identifier.

collection.description: What collection this collection preset is used for.

title.description: Name for the bookmark. If this is set, the collection preset will be considered to be a bookmark.

role.description: The unique identifier of a role in the platform. If user is null, this will be used to apply the collection preset or bookmark for all users in the role.

search_query.description: What the user searched for in search/filter in the header bar.

view_type.description: Name of the view type that is used. Defaults to tabular.

view_query.description: View query that's saved per view type. Controls what data is fetched on load. These follow the same format as the JS SDK parameters.

view_options.description: Options of the views. The properties in here are controlled by the layout.

translation.description: Key value pair of language-translation. Can be used to translate the bookmark title in multiple languages.

get.description: Returns a list of the fields available in the project.
Returns a list of the fields available in the given collection.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the collection the item resides in.
parameters.name: collection

post.description: Create a new field in a given collection.

field.description: Unique name of the field. Field name is unique within the collection.

type.description: Directus specific data type. Used to cast values in the API.

default_value.description: The default value of the field.

max_length.description: The max length of the field.

is_primary_key.description: If the field is primary key.

has_auto_increment.description: If the field has auto increment.

foreign_key_column.description: Related column from the foreign key constraint.

foreign_key_table.description: Related table from the foreign key constraint.

comment.description: Comment as saved in the database.

foreign_key_schema.description: Related schema from the foreign key constraint (pg only).

id.description: Unique identifier for the field in the `directus_fields` collection.

collection.description: Unique name of the collection this field is in.

field.description: Unique name of the field. Field name is unique within the collection.

system-interface.description: What interface is used in the admin app to edit the value for this field.

options.description: Options for the interface that's used. This format is based on the individual interface.

display.description: What display is used in the admin app to display the value for this field.

display_options.description: Options for the display that's used. This format is based on the individual display.

locked.description: If the field can be altered by the end user. Directus system fields have this value set to `true`.

readonly.description: Prevents the user from editing the value in the field.

hidden.description: If this field should be hidden.

sort.description: Sort order of this field on the edit page of the admin app.

width.description: Width of the field on the edit form.

group.description: What field group this field is part of.

translation.description: Key value pair of `<language>: <translation>` that allows the user to change the displayed name of the field in the admin app.

note.description: A user provided note for the field. Will be rendered alongside the interface on the edit page.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the collection the item resides in.
parameters.name: collection

get.description: List the relations.

patch.description: Update multiple nav_links items at the same time.

get.description: Retrieve a single nav_links item by unique identifier.
List the nav_links_translations items.

patch.description: Update multiple nav_links_translations items at the same time.

get.description: Retrieve a single nav_links_translations item by unique identifier.
List the pages_translations items.

patch.description: Update multiple pages_translations items at the same time.

List the pages items.

List the pages_blocks items.

patch.description: Update multiple pages_blocks items at the same time.

get.description: Retrieve a single pages_blocks item by unique identifier.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Image typed files can be dynamically resized and transformed to fit any need.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: All data within the platform is private by default. The public role can be configured to expose data without authentication, or you can pass an access token to the API to access private data.

tags.name: Schema
tags.description: Retrieve and update the schema of an instance.

tags.name: Server
tags.description: Access to where Directus runs. Allows you to make sure your server has everything needed to run the platform, and check what kind of latency we're dealing with.

tags.name: Utilities
tags.description: Directus comes with various utility endpoints you can use to simplify your development flow.

tags.name: Activity
tags.description: All events that happen within Directus are tracked and stored in the activities collection. This gives you full accountability over everything that happens.

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Permissions control who has access to what and when.

tags.name: Collections
tags.description: Collections are the individual collections of items, similar to tables in a database. Changes to collections will alter the schema of the database.

tags.name: Folders
tags.description: Group files by virtual folders.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Files can be saved in any given location. Directus has a powerful assets endpoint that can be used to generate thumbnails for images on the fly.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Users are what gives you access to the data.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Roles are groups of users that share permissions.

tags.name: ItemsLanguages
tags.description: Supported locales (en required, fr/es optional). Used by Translations fields across all collections.

tags.name: Presets
tags.description: Presets hold the preferences of individual users of the platform. This allows Directus to show and maintain custom item listings for users of the app.

tags.name: Fields
tags.description: Fields are individual pieces of content within an item. They are mapped to columns in the database.

tags.name: Relations
tags.description: What data is linked to what other data. Allows you to assign authors to articles, products to sales, and whatever other structures you can think of.

tags.name: Revisions
tags.description: Revisions are individual changes to items made. Directus keeps track of changes made, so you're able to revert to a previous state at will.

tags.name: ItemsServices
tags.description: Service offerings. Canonical source for /services/<id> pages. See docs/project/SERVICES.md.

tags.name: ItemsServicesTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for services collection (Directus-native Translations pattern).

tags.name: Flows
tags.description: Flows enable custom, event-driven data processing and task automation.

tags.name: Extensions
tags.description: Directus can easily be extended through the addition of several types of extensions, including layouts, interfaces, and modules.

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: Operations are the building blocks within Data Flows.

tags.name: Versions
tags.description: Enables users to create unpublished copies of an item, modify them independently from the main version, and promote them to become the new main version when ready.

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Comments can be added to items.

tags.name: ItemsServicesDeliverables
tags.description: Typical-deliverables list items per service. O2M from services; each item is a LocalizedString.

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Settings control the way the platform works and acts.

tags.name: ItemsServicesSections
tags.description: Rich detail-page content blocks per service. O2M from services; each block has title + content LocalizedString.

tags.name: ItemsMorphShapes
tags.description: Geometric morph-target library. Consumed by SVG morph animations. Adding a new shape via Data Studio works without a code deploy. Public read.

tags.name: ItemsIllustrations
tags.description: Curated SVG illustration library — consumed by blog_posts.svg_illustration + projects.svg_illustration. Reusable across content types. ai-editor: cannot delete.

tags.name: ItemsProjectsImpactMetrics
tags.description: Quantitative impact metrics per project. O2M from projects; first row (sort=0) is the featured metric.

tags.name: ItemsProjectsSections
tags.description: Rich detail-page content blocks per project. O2M from projects; each block has title + content LocalizedString.

tags.name: ItemsProjectsServices
tags.description: M2M junction between projects and services.

tags.name: ItemsProjectsTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for projects collection (Directus-native Translations pattern).

tags.name: ItemsProjects
tags.description: Portfolio projects with translated content (title, one_liner, description), sections, impact metrics, and M2M relations to services. AI-editor: cannot publish; cannot delete.

tags.name: ItemsBlogPosts
tags.description: Blog posts. Mono-language by editorial design (lang field on parent). ai-editor cannot publish; cannot delete. Body uses Block Editor (rich content per CONVENTIONS § 7).

tags.name: ItemsTechStack
tags.description: Tech stack items (languages, frameworks, tools). Parent has international `name` + `icon`; per-locale Block Editor body lives on tech_stack_translations. M2M to services + projects via tech_stack_services + tech_stack_projects junctions. Per Slice 18 18g: NO layer/domain/proficiency/connectsTo metadata — categorization is solely by service+project relations.

tags.name: ItemsTechStackProjects
tags.description: M2M junction between tech_stack and projects.

tags.name: ItemsTechStackServices
tags.description: M2M junction between tech_stack and services.

tags.name: ItemsTechStackTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for tech_stack collection (Directus-native Translations pattern). Contains per-locale Block Editor body fields: what_it_is, what_i_use_it_for, why_i_use_it_instead.

tags.name: ItemsIcons
tags.description: Editor-facing icon library. Each entry is a named icon that any content type can M2O reference. `iconify_id` stores the full Iconify reference (e.g. logos:react); `svg_override` takes precedence when set. Category tags for filtering.

tags.name: ItemsRouteSEOTranslations
tags.description: Per-locale title + description overrides for route_seo. Both nullable — empty means fall back to site_meta defaults.

tags.name: ItemsRouteSEO
tags.description: Per-route SEO override (title + description + og_image) for static routes. Falls back to site_meta defaults when fields are empty. Static routes only — dynamic routes (/blog/[slug] etc.) use code factories.

tags.name: ItemsSiteMetaTranslations
tags.description: Per-locale fields for site_meta (tagline, description, default_description, owner_job_title).

tags.name: ItemsSiteMeta
tags.description: Site identity + SEO defaults (brand name, contact links, owner identity, fallback OG image, theme color). Singleton — one row only. CMS source-of-truth replacing apps/web/src/lib/content/meta.ts § siteMeta.

tags.name: ItemsBlockBlogPageContentTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_blog_page_content. 1 string column (intro).

tags.name: ItemsBlockAboutContent
tags.description: About page content block (/about). Non-translatable: client_count (integer) on parent. All other fields are JSON columns in translations — each top-level chunk (identity, metrics, methodology, testimonials, tech_stack, interests, weather, client_logos, cta, stop_labels, labels, meta) is one JSON column preserving the nested TS shape with bare strings.

tags.name: ItemsBlockAboutContentTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_about_content. 12 JSON columns — one per top-level AboutContent chunk.

tags.name: ItemsBlockAboutIntro
tags.description: About teaser block — home page About section (NOT /about page). Non-translatable: stack_items (string[]) on parent. All LocalizedString leaves in translations.

tags.name: ItemsBlockAboutIntroTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_about_intro. 7 string columns (name, title, bio, more_link, stack_label, location_label, interests_label) + 2 JSON columns (location, interests).

tags.name: ItemsBlockBlogPageContent
tags.description: Blog page chrome block (/blog). Minimal stub — only intro field per BlogPageContentSchema. Expand when content design lands.

tags.name: ItemsBlockCloser
tags.description: Closer block — TERMINUS / end-of-line section of /. Non-translatable: cta_href (string), attribution_url (string) on parent. All LocalizedString leaves in translations as JSON columns.

tags.name: ItemsBlockCloserTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_closer. 3 string columns (heading, heading_dot, subheading) + 4 JSON columns (cta, rows, attribution, terminal).

tags.name: ItemsBlockContactContent
tags.description: Contact page content block (/contact). Non-translatable: web3forms_key (string) on parent. All LocalizedString leaves in translations as JSON columns per top-level chunk.

tags.name: ItemsBlockContactContentTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_contact_content. 3 string columns (page_title, station_label, send_error_message) + 4 JSON columns (info_terminal, form_terminal, validation, success, socials_json) + meta JSON.

tags.name: ItemsBlockCTA
tags.description: CTA block — bottom of /. All 4 fields are LocalizedStrings → 4 string columns in translations.

tags.name: ItemsBlockCTATranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_cta. 4 string columns (heading, subtitle, cta_contact, cta_github).

tags.name: ItemsBlockHero
tags.description: Hero block — text-only top section of /. Translatable fields live in block_hero_translations (4 string + 4 JSON columns). No image or mock_data fields — hero is text-only; heroMock is runtime-computed.

tags.name: ItemsBlockHeroTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_hero (Directus-native Translations pattern). 4 string columns (subheadline, subtitle, cta_work, cta_contact) + 4 JSON columns (headline, sql_panel, refresh_button, hero_anim).

tags.name: ItemsBlockManifesto
tags.description: Manifesto block — section 2 of /. Non-translatable fields: ticks (string[]) on parent. All LocalizedString leaves live in block_manifesto_translations as JSON columns.

tags.name: ItemsBlockManifestoTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_manifesto. 6 JSON columns: statement, terminal, pills, edge_left, edge_right, edge_bottom, transit, hidden_transit_lines. ticks is non-translatable, lives on parent.

tags.name: ItemsBlockProjectsPageContent
tags.description: Projects page chrome block (/work). Minimal stub — only intro field per ProjectsPageContentSchema. Expand when content design lands.

tags.name: ItemsBlockProjectsPageContentTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_projects_page_content. 1 string column (intro).

tags.name: ItemsBlockProofReel
tags.description: Proof Reel block — featured projects section of /. Non-translatable fields: view_all_href (string), slugs (string[]), images (Record<string,string>) on parent. LocalizedString leaves in block_proof_reel_translations.

tags.name: ItemsBlockProofReelTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_proof_reel. 5 string columns (heading, heading_dot, subheading, section_label, view_all_label) + 1 string column (toggle_color_aria).

tags.name: ItemsBlockServicesGrid
tags.description: Services Grid block — section 3 of /. All fields are LocalizedStrings → string columns in translations. No M2M to services collection (not needed for 18i scope).

tags.name: ItemsBlockServicesGridTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_services_grid. 5 string columns (heading, heading_dot, subheading, view_illustration_aria, view_all_link).

tags.name: ItemsBlockTechStackPageContent
tags.description: Tech Stack page chrome block (/tech-stack). All fields are LocalizedStrings → 4 JSON columns in translations (hero, actions, cta, meta). No M2M to tech_stack collection (not in TS shape).

tags.name: ItemsBlockTechStackPageContentTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for block_tech_stack_page_content. 4 JSON columns (hero, actions, cta, meta).

tags.name: ItemsErrorPages
tags.description: Flat collection keyed by HTTP status_code. Seed rows: 404, 500, 0 (generic fallback). status_code = 0 is the catch-all when no specific row matches. Spec §2.3 L3.

tags.name: ItemsErrorPagesTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for error_pages (Directus-native Translations pattern). label, heading, description (multiline), terminal_line, suggestions (JSON array of {label, href}).

tags.name: ItemsNavLinks
tags.description: Site-wide navigation links. Single flat collection — placement enum drives header, footer, mobile, and menu slots. Spec §2.3.

tags.name: ItemsNavLinksTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for nav_links (Directus-native Translations pattern). label (required), subtitle (nullable — only used when placement = menu).

tags.name: ItemsPagesTranslations
tags.description: Translated copy for pages collection (Directus-native Translations pattern).

tags.name: ItemsPages
tags.description: Page parent collection — one row per route. M2A 'blocks' wires to 12 block_* collections. Spec §2.2.

tags.name: ItemsPagesBlocks
tags.description: M2A junction between pages and the 12 block_* collections. Sort field controls block order on a page.

storage.description: Where the file is stored. Either `local` for the local filesystem or the name of the storage adapter (for example `s3`).

filename_disk.description: Name of the file on disk. By default, Directus uses a random hash for the filename.

filename_download.description: How you want to the file to be named when it's being downloaded.

title.description: Title for the file. Is extracted from the filename on upload, but can be edited by the user.

folder.description: Virtual folder where this file resides in.

filesize.description: Size of the file in bytes.

width.description: Width of the file in pixels. Only applies to images.

height.description: Height of the file in pixels. Only applies to images.

duration.description: Duration of the file in seconds. Only applies to audio and video.

embed.description: Where the file was embedded from.

location.description: Where the file was created. Is automatically populated based on Exif data for images.

tags.description: Tags for the file. Is automatically populated based on Exif data for images.

metadata.description: IPTC, Exif, and ICC metadata extracted from file

uploaded_on.description: When the file was last uploaded/replaced.

legacy_path.description: Idempotency key for migrate-assets (slice-18d). Set by the migration script; do NOT edit post-migration. Format: `images/<relative-path-from-static>`.

parent.description: Unique identifier of the parent folder. This allows for nested folders.

description.example: Admins have access to all managed data within the system by default

email.description: Unique email address for the user.

tags.description: The user's tags.

language.description: The user's language used in Directus.

tfa_secret.description: The 2FA secret string that's used to generate one time passwords.

status.description: Status of the user.

role.description: Unique identifier of the role of this user.

last_access.description: When this user used the API last.

last_page.description: Last page that the user was on.

fields.description: Control what fields are being returned in the object.

search.description: Filter by items that contain the given search query in one of their fields.

sort.description: How to sort the returned items.

limit.description: Set the maximum number of items that will be returned

offset.description: How many items to skip when fetching data.

page.description: Cursor for use in pagination. Often used in combination with limit.

deep.description: Deep allows you to set any of the other query parameters on a nested relational dataset.

total_count.description: Returns the total item count of the collection you're querying.

filter_count.description: Returns the item count of the collection you're querying, taking the current filter/search parameters into account.

user.description: The user who performed this action.

ip.description: The IP address of the user at the time the action took place.

user_agent.description: User agent string of the browser the user used when the action took place.
user_agent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_1) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML,like Gecko) Chrome/78.0.3904.108 Safari/537.36

collection.description: Collection identifier in which the item resides.

item.description: Unique identifier for the item the action applied to. This is always a string, even for integer primary keys.

origin.description: Origin of the request when the action took place.

collection.description: What collection this permission applies to.

action.description: What action this permission applies to.

permissions.description: JSON structure containing the permissions checks for this permission.

validation.description: JSON structure containing the validation checks for this permission.

presets.description: JSON structure containing the preset value for created/updated items.

fields.description: CSV of fields that the user is allowed to interact with.

collection.description: The collection key.

id.description: Unique identifier for this single collection preset.

bookmark.description: Name for the bookmark. If this is set, the preset will be considered a bookmark.

user.description: The unique identifier of the user to whom this collection preset applies.

role.description: The unique identifier of a role in the platform. If `user` is null, this will be used to apply the collection preset or bookmark for all users in the role.

collection.description: What collection this collection preset is used for.

layout.description: Key of the layout that is used.

layout_query.description: Layout query that's saved per layout type. Controls what data is fetched on load. These follow the same format as the JS SDK parameters.

layout_options.description: Options of the views. The properties in here are controlled by the layout.

collection.description: Unique name of the collection this field is in.

field.description: Unique name of the field. Field name is unique within the collection.

many_collection.description: Collection that has the field that holds the foreign key.

many_field.description: Foreign key. Field that holds the primary key of the related collection.

one_collection.description: Collection on the _one_ side of the relationship.

one_field.description: Alias column that serves as the _one_ side of the relationship.

junction_field.description: Field on the junction table that holds the many field of the related relation.

activity.description: Unique identifier for the activity record.

collection.description: Collection of the updated item.

data.description: Copy of item state at time of update.

delta.description: Changes between the previous and the current revision.

parent.description: If the current item was updated relationally, this is the id of the parent revision record

id.description: Kebab-case identifier (e.g. sql-development). Used as URL slug.

station.description: Sequential position in the train journey (1..N). Drives ordering + prev/next nav.

svg.description: SVG illustration filename (e.g. service-sql.svg). Served from static/svg/services/.

visible.description: Show in listings. Default true; set false to hide without deleting.

stack.description: Array of tech names (e.g. PostgreSQL, Python, Retool).

projects.description: Projects that use this service. Bidirectional view of `projects.services` (junction: projects_services).

tech_stack.description: Tech-stack items used by this service. Bidirectional view of `tech_stack.services` (junction: tech_stack_services).

long_description.description: 2-3 paragraph deep dive for the detail page.

value_proposition.description: How this helps you � client-facing value proposition.

benefit_headline.description: Visitor-facing outcome shown above the service title on home grid.

impact_metric_value.description: Display string for home grid metric (e.g. 3x faster).

impact_metric_label.description: Context label for home grid metric (e.g. avg query improvement).

icon.description: Icon displayed in the Admin App for the flow.

color.description: Color of the icon displayed in the Admin App for the flow.

status.description: Current status of the flow.

trigger.description: Type of trigger for the flow. One of `hook`, `webhook`, `operation`, `schedule`, `manual`.

accountability.description: The permission used during the flow. One of `$public`, `$trigger`, `$full`, or UUID of a role.

options.description: Options of the selected trigger for the flow.

operation.description: UUID of the operation connected to the trigger in the flow.

date_created.description: Timestamp in ISO8601 when the flow was created.

user_created.description: The user who created the flow.

bundle.description: Name of the bundle the extension is in.

key.description: Key for the operation. Must be unique within a given flow.

type.description: Type of operation. One of `log`, `mail`, `notification`, `create`, `read`, `request`, `sleep`, `transform`, `trigger`, `condition`, or any type of custom operation extensions.

position_x.description: Position of the operation on the X axis within the flow workspace.

position_y.description: Position of the operation on the Y axis within the flow workspace.

options.description: Options depending on the type of the operation.

resolve.description: The operation triggered when the current operation succeeds (or `then` logic of a condition operation).

reject.description: The operation triggered when the current operation fails (or `otherwise` logic of a condition operation).

date_created.description: Timestamp in ISO8601 when the operation was created.

user_created.description: The user who created the operation.

id.description: Primary key of the Content Version.

key.description: Key of the Content Version, used as the value for the "version" query parameter.

name.description: Descriptive name of the Content Version.

collection.description: Name of the collection the Content Version is created on.

item.description: The item the Content Version is created on.

date_created.description: When the Content Version was created.

date_updated.description: When the Content Version was last updated.

user_created.description: User that created the Content Version.

user_updated.description: User that last updated the Content Version.

delta.description: The current changes compared to the main version of the item.

id.description: Unique identifier for this single collection preset.

collection.description: The collection of the item the Comment is created for.

item.description: The item the Comment is created for.

comment.description: User comment. This will store the comments that show up in the right sidebar of the item edit page in the admin app.

project_color.description: The brand color of the project.

public_note.description: Note rendered on the public pages of the app.

auth_login_attempts.description: Allowed authentication login attempts before the user's status is set to blocked.

storage_asset_transform.description: What transformations are allowed in the assets endpoint.

key.description: Key for the asset. Used in the assets endpoint.

fit.description: Whether to crop the thumbnail to match the size, or maintain the aspect ratio.

arguments.description: A list of arguments to pass to the Sharp method

argument.description: A JSON representation of the argument value

content.description: Section body. Plain text (Markdown rendered by consumer is an option).

description.description: Optional editor notes (when to use this shape).

path.description: SVG path d= attribute, e.g. "M24 8 L40 38 L8 38 Z". Must be a closed shape compatible with MorphSVGPlugin.

viewbox.description: SVG viewBox, e.g. "0 0 48 48". Default matches existing shape lib.

category.description: Filters which posts/projects can pick this in their dropdown.

file.description: SVG file (recommended viewBox: 0 0 48 48; stroke-only; brand colors).

label.description: Human-readable name shown in dropdown, e.g. "Database engineering".

tags.description: Filter / search aid across content types.

before.description: Locale-universal baseline value before improvement (e.g. 2 days). Optional.

sort.description: Order within the parent project (ascending). First row (sort=0) is the featured metric.

label.description: Human-readable metric label (e.g. Real-time refresh cycles).

description.description: Long-form description rendered via BlockRenderer (Block Editor JSON).

one_liner.description: One-sentence summary for cards and listings (max 500 chars).

content.description: Section body rendered via BlockRenderer (Block Editor JSON).

date_published.description: When the project was publicly published.

featured.description: Highlight this project on the portfolio landing page.

hero_image.description: Hero image for the project detail page.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier (e.g. real-time-dashboard). Used as URL slug.

live_url.description: Live deployed URL of the project.

location.description: Geographic location or context (e.g. Remote — Montreal, QC).

readme_url.description: Direct link to the project README.

stack.description: Array of tech names (e.g. PostgreSQL, Python, Svelte).

status.description: Publication state. AI-editor cannot set to published.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags (e.g. data-engineering, analytics).

version.description: Version string or milestone (e.g. v2.1, Phase 3).

svg_illustration.description: Optional decorative illustration. Cascade fallback to related-services SVGs is unchanged.

tech_stack.description: Tech-stack items used by this project. Bidirectional view of `tech_stack.projects` (junction: tech_stack_projects).

body.description: Post body. Block Editor — supports headings, paragraphs (with bold/italic/link/inline-code marks), ordered/bullet lists, code blocks (with language), blockquotes, horizontal rules, images (Directus assets), embeds.

id.description: Slug — kebab-case, URL-safe. Becomes the route segment at /blog/{id}.

animation.description: Entrance animation type for the SVG illustration.

cover_image.description: Optional hero image (preset hero-1200 used at render).

date_published.description: ISO datetime; controls listing sort. Set when status flips to published.

external.description: When true, body becomes optional and url is required + visible.

lang.description: Language of the body. Each post is mono-language; use translations junction for title/excerpt across locales.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

svg_illustration.description: Curated SVG illustration. Optional — falls back to deterministic fallback if absent.

tags.description: Lowercase keywords, used in listing filter.

url.description: External URL. Required + visible when external=true.

excerpt.description: 1–2 sentences shown on listing cards. Mono-language with the post's native language (see lang field). Max 500 chars.

title.description: Post title in the post's native language (see lang field). Mono-language by editorial design — no translation junction.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier (e.g. postgresql, apache-airflow). Used as URL slug for future detail pages.

name.description: International display name (tech names are universal — no translation needed). E.g. "Apache Airflow", "PostgreSQL".

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. AI-editor cannot set to published.

what_it_is.description: Factual description of the technology. Block Editor — supports headings, paragraphs (with bold/italic/link/inline-code marks), ordered/bullet lists, code blocks, blockquotes.

what_i_use_it_for.description: Concrete usage and case study for this technology. Replaces the 'In Practice' section from the static markdown source. Block Editor — supports headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks.

why_i_use_it_instead.description: Comparison angle vs. alternatives — why this technology instead of another solution. Replaces the 'Why I use it' section from the static markdown source. Block Editor — supports headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks.

category.description: Filtering categories. Suggested values: tech-stack, service, brand, generic. Free-form — type and press Enter.

iconify_id.description: Browse [icon-sets.iconify.design](https://icon-sets.iconify.design/) — click any icon, copy the ID shown under it (e.g. logos:react, mdi:home).

id.description: Kebab-case identifier (e.g. airflow, postgresql, python, brand-monogram). Used as the reference key when other collections M2O this icon.

name.description: International display name (tech names are universal — no translation needed). E.g. "Apache Airflow", "PostgreSQL", "Brand Monogram".

notes.description: Admin-only context (attribution, licensing, usage notes). Not exposed via API.

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. AI-editor cannot set to published.

svg_override.description: Uploaded SVG that takes precedence over `iconify_id`. Upload to the icons folder. Leave blank to use the Iconify ID instead.

description.description: Per-route description override. Empty -> fall back to site_meta.default_description.

title.description: Per-route title body. Empty -> fall back to code-side default. Site-name suffix auto-appended in adapter (per route, gated by composedTitleStrategy).

og_image.description: Per-route OG override (1200x630). Falls back to site_meta.default_og_image if null. Folder: og.

path.description: SvelteKit route id, e.g., /, /about, /services. Static routes only.

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. AI-editor cannot set to published.

default_description.description: SEO fallback meta description (50–200 chars per SEO best practice).

default_og_image.description: Site-wide fallback OG image (1200x630). Folder: og.

name.description: Brand name + page title suffix. Currently 'yesid.'

owner_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., CA, US, MX)

theme_color.description: Hex color for <meta name='theme-color'>. Default #141414 dark.

intro.description: Per-locale intro copy (BlogPageContentSchema.intro). Expand schema here when content design lands.

client_count.description: Non-translatable client count integer displayed in counter (AboutContent.clientCount). e.g. 10.

client_logos.description: Non-translatable client logos (AboutContent.clientLogos). JSON shape: Array<{ name, src: string, url?: string }>. AboutClientLogo has no LocalizedString leaves so it lives on the parent block, not on _translations.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'About Page Content'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

tech_stack.description: Non-translatable legacy tech stack items for About bento (AboutContent.techStack). JSON shape: Array<{ name, category, relatedServices: string[] }>. AboutTechItem has no LocalizedString leaves so it lives on the parent block, not on _translations.

cta.description: Per-locale terminal CTA block (AboutContent.cta). JSON shape: { command: string, lines: Array<{text,color}>, buttonLabel, buttonHref: string, availability, socials: Array<{label,href,icon}> }.

identity.description: Per-locale identity block (AboutContent.identity + AboutIdentity). JSON shape: { name, title, valueProp, headshot: string (URL), polaroids: Array<{src, alt, caption, rotate}> }.

interests.description: Per-locale interests strips (AboutContent.interests). JSON shape: Array<{ id, label, image: string }>.

labels.description: Per-locale misc chrome labels (AboutContent.labels). JSON shape: { clientsServed, polaroidPrevAria, polaroidNextAria, testimonialsCarouselAria, testimonialsTabNavAria, testimonialSlideAria, showTestimonialAria } — all strings.

meta.description: Per-locale page meta (AboutContent.meta). JSON shape: { title: string, description: string }.

methodology.description: Per-locale methodology steps (AboutContent.methodology). JSON shape: Array<{ id, label, description, station: number }>.

metrics.description: Per-locale metrics array (AboutContent.metrics). JSON shape: Array<{ value: string, label: string, icon?: string }>.

stop_labels.description: Per-locale metro stop labels (AboutContent.stopLabels). JSON shape: { identity, metrics, testimonials, process, stack, clients, interests, snapshots, location, next } — all strings.

testimonials.description: Per-locale testimonials (AboutContent.testimonials). JSON shape: Array<{ quote, author: string, role, company: string, logo?: string }>.

weather.description: Per-locale weather widget config (AboutContent.weather). JSON shape: { city, hook: string, enabled: boolean }.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home About Intro'). Required.

stack_items.description: Non-translatable list of stack item strings (AboutIntroContent.stackItems). JSON: string[].

status.description: Publication state.

location.description: Per-locale location object (AboutIntroContent.location). JSON shape: { city: string, region: string }.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Blog Page Content'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

cta_href.description: Non-translatable href for the CTA button (CloserContent.cta.href).

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home Closer'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

attribution.description: Per-locale attribution text (CloserContent.attribution.text). JSON shape: { text: string }. url lives as attribution_url on parent.

cta.description: Per-locale CTA object (CloserContent.cta). JSON shape: { label: string }. href lives as cta_href on parent.

rows.description: Per-locale rows object (CloserContent.rows). JSON shape: { contact: { label, description, action }, connect: { label, description, action }, read: { label, action }, about: { label, description, action } }.

terminal.description: Per-locale terminal chrome (CloserContent.terminal). JSON shape: { title, city, encoding, destinationsLabel, prompt } — all strings.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Contact Page Content'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

web3forms_key.description: Public web3forms access key (ContactContent.web3formsKey). Safe to expose client-side.

form_terminal.description: Per-locale form terminal block (ContactContent.formTerminal). JSON shape: { title, command: string, commandOutput, fields: { name: {label,placeholder}, email: {label,placeholder}, message: {label,placeholder} }, submitLabel }.

info_terminal.description: Per-locale info terminal block (ContactContent.infoTerminal). JSON shape: { title, command: string, location, responseTime, sectionLabels: { location, connect } }.

meta.description: Per-locale page meta (ContactContent.meta). JSON shape: { title: string, description: string }.

page_title.description: Per-locale page title (ContactContent.pageTitle). Renders as desktop edge title + mobile h1.

send_error_message.description: Per-locale error message when web3forms POST fails (ContactContent.sendErrorMessage).

socials.description: Per-locale socials array (ContactContent.socials). JSON shape: Array<{ label, href, icon: string }>. label is translatable; href/icon are non-locale-specific but bundled in JSON for simplicity.

station_label.description: Per-locale station subtitle (ContactContent.stationLabel). e.g. 'NEXT STOP: YOU'.

success.description: Per-locale success state messages (ContactContent.success). JSON shape: { validating, sending, sent, responseTime, meanwhile, resetLabel, fieldOk }.

validation.description: Per-locale validation messages (ContactContent.validation). JSON shape: { required, invalidEmail, errorSummary }.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home CTA'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home Hero'). Required — editors must give each block a meaningful name.

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

cta_contact.description: Per-locale label for the 'contact' CTA button (HeroContent.ctaContact).

cta_work.description: Per-locale label for the 'work' CTA button (HeroContent.ctaWork).

headline.description: Per-locale headline object (HeroContent.headline). JSON shape: { line1: string, line2: string, ariaSuffix: string }. ariaSuffix is appended for screen readers when line2 renders as a visual glyph.

hero_anim.description: Per-locale hero animation chrome copy (HeroAnimContent). JSON shape: { scrollDown: string }. Lives here (not a separate block) per Task 1.0 mapping decision.

refresh_button.description: Per-locale refresh button copy (HeroContent.refreshButton). JSON shape: { label: string, helper: string }.

sql_panel.description: Per-locale SQL panel copy (HeroContent.sqlPanel). JSON shape: { prompt: string, liveLabel: string, columns: { route: string, avgDelayS: string, vehicles: string }, metaTemplate: string }.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home Manifesto'). Required.

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

ticks.description: Non-translatable array of tick strings (ManifestoContent.ticks). JSON shape: string[].

edge_bottom.description: Per-locale bottom edge chrome (ManifestoContent.edgeBottom). JSON shape: { connected: string, line: string, url: string, version: string, scrollHint: string }.

edge_left.description: Per-locale left edge chrome (ManifestoContent.edgeLeft). JSON shape: { sectionNumber: string, sectionName: string, location: string }.

edge_right.description: Per-locale right edge chrome (ManifestoContent.edgeRight). JSON shape: { lat: string, lng: string, src: string, via: string, dst: string, node: string, status: string }.

hidden_transit_lines.description: Per-locale hidden transit lines (ManifestoContent.hiddenTransitLines). JSON shape: Array<{ name: string, color: string }>. color is non-translatable hex; name is the per-locale string.

pills.description: Per-locale pills array (ManifestoContent.pills). JSON shape: Array<{ label: string, serviceId: string }>. serviceId is a non-translatable slug; label is the per-locale string.

statement.description: Per-locale manifesto statement (ManifestoContent.statement). JSON shape: { line1: string, lineHuge: string, line3Part1: string, line3Highlight: string, line3Part2: string }.

terminal.description: Per-locale terminal chrome (ManifestoContent.terminal). JSON shape: { user: string, command: string }.

transit.description: Per-locale transit arrival panel chrome (ManifestoContent.transit). JSON shape: { arrivalLabel: string, platformBadge: string, directionBadge: string }.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Projects Page Content'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

intro.description: Per-locale intro copy (ProjectsPageContentSchema.intro). Expand schema here when content design lands.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home Proof Reel'). Required.

slugs.description: Non-translatable ordered list of project slugs (ProofReelContent.slugs). JSON: string[].

status.description: Publication state.

view_all_href.description: Non-translatable href for the View All link (ProofReelContent.viewAllHref).

toggle_color_aria.description: Per-locale aria-label template for toggle color (ProofReelContent.toggleColorAria). Placeholder {title}.

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Home Services Grid'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

view_all_link.description: Per-locale label for the View All link at the bottom of the grid (ServicesGridContent.viewAllLink).

view_illustration_aria.description: Per-locale aria-label template for illustration view. Brace placeholder {title} (ServicesGridContent.viewIllustrationAria).

editor_label.description: Non-translatable admin label for Data Studio M2A picker (e.g. 'Tech Stack Page Content'). Required.

status.description: Publication state.

actions.description: Per-locale action button labels (TechStackPageContentSchema.actions). JSON shape: { getInTouch: string, viewServices: string }.

cta.description: Per-locale CTA section (TechStackPageContentSchema.cta). JSON shape: { headingLine1, headingLine2, sub, availability: string }.

hero.description: Per-locale hero chrome (TechStackPageContentSchema.hero). JSON shape: { overline, titleLine1, titleLine2, terminalAria, stats: { technologies: string } }.

meta.description: Per-locale page meta (TechStackPageContentSchema.meta). JSON shape: { title: string, description: string }.

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

status_code.description: HTTP status code (404, 500, etc.). 0 = generic fallback — used when no specific status_code row is seeded. UNIQUE constraint enforced.

description.description: Per-locale longer description shown below the heading. Multiline copy explaining the error and prompting the visitor.

heading.description: Per-locale primary heading (e.g. 'This station is under construction').

label.description: Per-locale short label (e.g. 'Error 404' / 'Erreur 404'). Shown above the heading.

suggestions.description: Per-locale suggestion links — JSON array of {label: string, href: string}. The label is the locale-resolved display text; href is the destination path.

terminal_line.description: Per-locale terminal-style ASCII line shown below the description (e.g. '$ route --status 404 // requested path not in service').

href.description: Link destination. Supports internal paths (/about), anchors (#contact), and external URLs (https://github.com/...).

icon.description: Optional icon from the icons collection. Only used for icon-decorated nav links (e.g. social links in footer or mobile nav).

placement.description: Which nav surface renders this link. header/footer/mobile = NavLink shape; menu = MenuItem shape (renders subtitle).

priority.description: Display order within a placement slot. 1 = always visible, 2 = hidden on narrow viewports. Matches NavLinkSchema's z.union([z.literal(1), z.literal(2)]) so parsePort accepts Directus payloads without coercion.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

subtitle.description: Per-locale subtitle — only rendered when placement = 'menu' (MenuItem.subtitle). Nullable for header/footer/mobile placements.

slug.description: Route slug — UNIQUE per page. e.g. 'home', 'about', 'contact'. Used by loadPage(slug).

sort.description: Manual sort order. Populated by drag-and-drop in list view.

status.description: Publication state. ai-editor cannot set to published.

blocks.description: M2A — page blocks. Sort order is on pages_blocks junction. Block collections land in Tasks 1.3–1.4; allowed_collections wired on push.

Collection.description: Collection of which you want to retrieve the items from.
Collection.name: collection

Search.description: Filter by items that contain the given search query in one of their fields.
Search.name: search

Page.description: Cursor for use in pagination. Often used in combination with limit.
Page.name: page

Offset.description: How many items to skip when fetching data.
Offset.name: offset

Sort.description: How to sort the returned items. `sort` is a CSV of fields used to sort the fetched items. Sorting defaults to ascending (ASC) order but a minus sign (` - `) can be used to reverse this to descending (DESC) order. Fields are prioritized by their order in the CSV. You can also use a ` ? ` to sort randomly.
Sort.name: sort

Meta.description: What metadata to return in the response.
Meta.name: meta

Limit.description: A limit on the number of objects that are returned.
Limit.name: limit

Filter.description: Select items in collection by given conditions.
Filter.name: filter

Fields.description: Control what fields are being returned in the object.
Fields.name: fields

Export.name: export
Export.description: Saves the API response to a file. Accepts one of "csv", "csv_utf8", "json", "xml", "yaml".

Version.name: version
Version.description: Retrieve an item's state from a specific Content Version. The value corresponds to the "key" of the Content Version.
